posts.author: RocketMan
posts.community: Exicom Tele-Services: A Key Player in the Booming EV Sector
posts.text: NVIDIA is shifting to an 800V DC architecture for its AI data centers. This needs power to be converted from AC to DC efficiently before it reaches the racks, and that conversion is done by rectifiers. Exicom is a leader in rectifiers for telecom towers, where they’ve spent years perfecting reliable AC to DC conversion. They then used that same expertise to venture into EV DC chargers, which is essentially a rectifier with regulated variable DC output, at higher power and voltage. Since the underlying competency is the same, just applied to a new use case. If Exicom can successfully extend thi…
